programs.title: Science View
programs.desc: . Squid and cuttlefish use camouflage not just to hide but to communicate. Vanguard Researchers explores the mechanism behind plant immunity. Tomoko Tashiro, Naoko Yamazaki, Michelle Yamamoto, Yoichi Sato, Tomoko Tina Kimura, Rena Yamada, Ross Mihara, Rachel Walzer.

programs.title: Frontrunners
programs.desc: . Taira Yuiko promotes composting of food waste to create a sustainable cycle. She works with an NGO in Mongolia to form a local nutrient cycle, enriching the soil and teaching composting techniques.

programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: My Street Piano
programs.desc: . Shimanto is a nature-rich town in Kochi Prefecture. A piano is placed on a park's outdoor stage, and people stop to play from their heart.

programs.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo
programs.desc: . Wakame, one of Japan's most popular types of seaweed, takes us to Sanriku in Miyagi Prefecture. Experience harvesting giant wakame and explore research advancing environmental protection.
